<{%fg 2%}>    [urn=urn:pulumi:test::test::pulumi:providers:pkgA::provA]

<{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>    A: <{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>"foo"<{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>

<{%fg 2%}>    [urn=urn:pulumi:test::test::pkgA:index:typ::resB]

    <{%fg 2%}>+ 3 created<{%reset%}>
